user.title: Tuya Lock Monitor
user.description:
Connect to the Tuya OpenAPI to monitor your smart lock.

**Where to find credentials:**
1. Log in to the Tuya IoT Platform (iot.tuya.com)
2. Go to **Cloud → Development → My Cloud Projects**
3. Open your project → **Overview** tab
4. Copy **Access ID** and **Access Secret**
5. Find your **Device ID** in **Cloud → Development → Devices**

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Tuya API. Check your endpoint and network.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid Access ID or Secret. Check your Tuya IoT Platform credentials.
